short_text: Ish Sodhi to Alei Nao, Caught by Mitchell!! Straight to long-on. Was the tossed up googly outside off, Alei Nao gets for
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Alei Nao, Caught by Mitchell!! Straight to long-on. Was the tossed up googly outside off, Alei Nao gets forward to loft and does not get the power to clear Mitchell who takes his third catch.

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Semo Kamea, 1 run, length delivery on the stumps, Semo Kamea pulls through square leg for one

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Kabua Morea, Stumped!! First for Ish Sodhi. Nicely tossed up legbreak outside off, turns away, Kabua Morea aims a leg-side swipe, misses, Conway does the rest.

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Alei Nao, 1 run, tossed up legbreak outside off, Alei Nao comes down the track to slog, the thick outside-edge runs wide of short third man

full_text: Boult to Norman Vanua, Caught by Mitchell!! Up in the air and caught at mid-wicket. Knuckle-ball into the wicket, Norman Vanua pulls and splices it, easy catch for Mitchell. That was well-disguised by Boult.

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Norman Vanua, , short and down leg, easy for Norman Vanua to pull to the deep backward square leg fence, poor delivery

full_text: Boult to Norman Vanua, 1 run, full outside off, Norman Vanua drives and the thick inside-edge misses the stumps and they take a quick single to Conway

full_text: Boult to Hiri Hiri, , good hit. Boult comes from round the wicket, Hiri Hiri gives the charge and lofts the full delivery wide of cover

short_text: Ferguson to Kiplin Doriga, no run, Will go down in the history books. No wonder the entire New Zealand team with smiles
full_text: Ferguson to Kiplin Doriga, no run, Will go down in the history books. No wonder the entire New Zealand team with smiles crowd Ferguson to congratulate. Nothing much from Ferguson though, he is happy to take all the plaudits. Coming back to the ball - Kiplin Doriga comes down the track but mistimes it back, was a length delivery that hurried the batter.

short_text: Ferguson to Kiplin Doriga, no run, short of length and nips back in to the body, Kiplin Doriga is beaten for pace, off t
full_text: Ferguson to Kiplin Doriga, no run, short of length and nips back in to the body, Kiplin Doriga is beaten for pace, off the thigh to gully

full_text: Ferguson to Kiplin Doriga, no run, short outside off, hurries Kiplin Doriga on the pull, miscued and it falls in front of mid-off running in

full_text: Ferguson to Kiplin Doriga, leg byes, 2 runs, Kiplin Doriga comes down the track but is beaten by the length delivery on the stumps, rapped on the pads and it rolls to Sodhi at third man who takes it easy, the batters do well to spot that and come back for the 2nd

full_text: Ferguson to Chad Soper, Bowled!! Dragged on. No feet and the full delivery angles in and Chad Soper pushes with an angled bat, thick inside-edge falls back on the stumps. 3/0 so far for Ferguson.

full_text: Santner to Chad Soper, 1 run, nearly back on! Length delivery outside off, turns away, Chad Soper punches and the thick inside-edge misses the stumps

short_text: Boult to Assad Vala, , superb shot. Assad Vala walks at Boult and drives it in the air, but too quick for Boult who went
full_text: Boult to Assad Vala, , superb shot. Assad Vala walks at Boult and drives it in the air, but too quick for Boult who went with an outstretched left hand, flicks the fingers and runs away to the fence. That was hit with power

full_text: Boult to Assad Vala, no run, again movement for Boult, short of length outside off, Assad Vala fiddles at it and is beaten

full_text: Boult to Assad Vala, no run, fullish outswinger outside off, Assad Vala is lured into a poke and does well not to edge that

short_text: Boult to Assad Vala, no run, full on the stumps, late swing away, Assad Vala on the forward defence gets a thick outside
full_text: Boult to Assad Vala, no run, full on the stumps, late swing away, Assad Vala on the forward defence gets a thick outside-edge that rolls to backward point

full_text: Southee to Charles Amini, no run, full outside off, nice drive but straight to the fielder at cover

short_text: Southee to Charles Amini, , Charles Amini gets lucky. Full outside off, he gets forward to drive, thick inside-edge runs
full_text: Southee to Charles Amini, , Charles Amini gets lucky. Full outside off, he gets forward to drive, thick inside-edge runs away past the stumps and to the fine-leg fence

short_text: Southee to Charles Amini, no run, full outside off, angling away from Charles Amini who lets it go at the moment, wanted
full_text: Southee to Charles Amini, no run, full outside off, angling away from Charles Amini who lets it go at the moment, wanted to have a dart at it initially

short_text: Southee to Tony Ura, Caught by Glenn Phillips!! Gone. Full outswinger on off, Tony Ura makes the mistake to go leg-side
full_text: Southee to Tony Ura, Caught by Glenn Phillips!! Gone. Full outswinger on off, Tony Ura makes the mistake to go leg-side as he swings at it, thick leading-edge flies behind backward point and Phillips runs back to take a safe catch. Southee with the early strike.

short_text: Southee to Assad Vala, leg byes, 1 run, swings into the pads, Assad Vala flicks and misses, off the pad to square leg an
full_text: Southee to Assad Vala, leg byes, 1 run, swings into the pads, Assad Vala flicks and misses, off the pad to square leg and they take a quick single

full_text: Southee to Assad Vala, no run, full and wide outside off, Assad Vala throws the bat on the drive and misses

full_text: Boult to Assad Vala, no run, short of length and nips back in to the thigh pad, Assad Vala tries to defend and misses, too high for LBW

full_text: Boult to Assad Vala, no run, full on the stumps, shape away, Assad Vala though shows the full face of the bat to defend it back

full_text: Boult to Assad Vala, no run, full on leg-stump, does not swing and Assad Vala flicks to square leg

short_text: Kabua Morea to Mitchell, 2 runs, I0$ Was a length delivery, slower, Mitchell went for the big heave and managed to send
full_text: Kabua Morea to Mitchell, 2 runs, I0$ Was a length delivery, slower, Mitchell went for the big heave and managed to send it over mid-on. The fielder tried but failed to get there. . But would be heading home and so would the PNG team

short_text: Kabua Morea to Mitchell, no run, fuller length delivery, angled in, Mitchell chips the ball down to mid-wicket. Lands on
full_text: Kabua Morea to Mitchell, no run, fuller length delivery, angled in, Mitchell chips the ball down to mid-wicket. Lands on a few bounce to the fielder

full_text: Semo Kamea to Mitchell, 1 run, fuller length delivery, angled on to the pads, clipped down to fine leg for a single

full_text: Semo Kamea to Mitchell, , fuller length delivery, outside off, Mitchell gets under it and slaps it over cover for a four. Got the ball in his radar and put it away

short_text: Semo Kamea to Mitchell, , and four more. Only 7 needed now. Was a fuller length delivery down leg, Mitchell clipped it f
full_text: Semo Kamea to Mitchell, , and four more. Only 7 needed now. Was a fuller length delivery down leg, Mitchell clipped it fine and the ball raced away for a four. That sped away fast

full_text: Semo Kamea to Williamson, 1 run, short of length delivery, angled in, pulled down to fine leg for a single

short_text: Semo Kamea to Mitchell, , on the pads, angled in, Mitchell whips it and sends it wide of deep square for a four. That wa
full_text: Semo Kamea to Mitchell, , on the pads, angled in, Mitchell whips it and sends it wide of deep square for a four. That was played away nicely as he put that away past deep square

full_text: Norman Vanua to Mitchell, 1 run, short of length delivery, outside off, Mitchell looks to power it through the off-side but gets an inside edge on to the on-side for a single

full_text: Norman Vanua to Williamson, 1 run, cue-ends the short ball down to deep cover for a single

full_text: Norman Vanua to Williamson, , short ball, angled in, Williamson gets hold of the delivery and pulls the ball down wide of long leg for a four. Superb shot indeed

full_text: Norman Vanua to Williamson, no run, back of a length delivery, Williamson climbs on top of it and fends the ball down into the deck

full_text: Norman Vanua to Williamson, no run, length delivery, angles in, Williamson looks to defend and gets an inside edge. The ball dribbled down into the off-side

full_text: Norman Vanua to Williamson, no run, length delivery, decks in, Williamson looks to defend and stabs it down into the with soft hands. Kept a little down

full_text: Semo Kamea to Mitchell, 2 runs, on the pads, angled in, Mitchell nudges it wide of long leg and scampers back for a brace

full_text: Semo Kamea to Mitchell, no run, back of a length delivery, angled in, Mitchell tucks it down on to the on-side with soft hands but fails to get it into the gap

full_text: Semo Kamea to Mitchell, no run, short ball, outside off, Mitchell looks to pull it and then bails out as that was well outside off

full_text: Semo Kamea to Mitchell, no run, fuller length delivery, Mitchell gets behind the line of the delivery and defends it back to the bowler

short_text: Semo Kamea to Conway, Lbw!! And Conway won't get a fifty here. Was a length delivery, decked in, missed the line and was
full_text: Semo Kamea to Conway, Lbw!! And Conway won't get a fifty here. Was a length delivery, decked in, missed the line and was trapped LBW in front of the wicket. That moved in quite a bit and Conway missed the line of the ball to be dismissed here. Conway did review but in vain. Third one down but a little too late.

short_text: Semo Kamea to Williamson, 1 run, stays low, Williamson walks across and tucks it down to deep mid for a single
full_text: Semo Kamea to Williamson, 1 run, stays low, Williamson walks across and tucks it down to deep mid for a single

short_text: Chad Soper to Conway, , and that's massive. Second sixer for Conway. Was a fuller one, outside off, Conway got under it
full_text: Chad Soper to Conway, , and that's massive. Second sixer for Conway. Was a fuller one, outside off, Conway got under it and slapped it down the ground for a sixer. Huge hit indeed. Still 26 needed now. Conway might look to finish this early

full_text: Chad Soper to Conway, no run, looks to put it away but fails to wood it

full_text: Chad Soper to Williamson, 3 runs, fuller length delivery, outside off, Williamson stabs it wide of cover for a triple. Managed to put it away into the gap but was pulled back

full_text: Chad Soper to Conway, 1 run, back of a length delivery, outside off, steered down to third man for a single

full_text: Chad Soper to Conway, no run, fuller length delivery, outside off, Conway squeezes the ball down to point

full_text: Semo Kamea to Williamson, , pure, pristine timing from Williamson! Was a fuller one, outside off, Williamson leant into the drive and managed to time it really well. The man at deep cover dived but failed to stop it. The physio will be attending him as that was a clumsy dive

full_text: Alei Nao to Williamson, 1 run, length delivery, outside off, dabbed down to third man for a single

short_text: Kabua Morea to Ravindra, Caught by Semo Kamea!! Morea has another one. Ravindra heaved it away off the pads and finds th
full_text: Kabua Morea to Ravindra, Caught by Semo Kamea!! Morea has another one. Ravindra heaved it away off the pads and finds the man at deep mid. Was a fuller one, on the pads, Ravindra wanted to walk into the shot but failed to get it away from the man at deep mid. Easy take for the fielder.

short_text: Alei Nao to Conway, no run, fuller length delivery, at the sticks, pushed back to the bowler. Still, 59 needed to win wi
full_text: Alei Nao to Conway, no run, fuller length delivery, at the sticks, pushed back to the bowler. Still, 59 needed to win with plenty of balls to go

full_text: Alei Nao to Conway, no run, looks to drive it away but gets an inside edge and the ball dribbled down to mid-wicket. The bottom hand came off the handle

full_text: Alei Nao to Ravindra, 1 run, gets it wide of mid-off for a single

full_text: Alei Nao to Conway, 1 run, length delivery well wide outside off, Conway throws his bat at it and slices it over point for a single to third man

short_text: Alei Nao to Conway, , and that's more like it! Half-a-dozen. Walks into the length delivery and heaves it over deep mid.
full_text: Alei Nao to Conway, , and that's more like it! Half-a-dozen. Walks into the length delivery and heaves it over deep mid. That will boost his confidence. He was standing outside his crease and then danced down to hit it over the fence

full_text: Alei Nao to Ravindra, 1 run, clips the ball down to mid-on for a single as the ball angled on to the pads of the batter

short_text: Assad Vala to Ravindra, 1 run, another single to end the over. Was very full, Ravindra clipped it down to mid-on and ran
full_text: Assad Vala to Ravindra, 1 run, another single to end the over. Was very full, Ravindra clipped it down to mid-on and ran through for a single. NZ batters have to be content with singles here as PNG bowlers have been on the money

full_text: Assad Vala to Conway, 1 run, goes back and punches it down to long-off for a single

full_text: Assad Vala to Conway, no run, goes back and pats it down to cover

full_text: Assad Vala to Ravindra, byes, 1 run, flatter one, goes through the gap and over the sticks. The batter looked to punch it and missed the line of the delivery. The keeper fumbled it and they get a single

full_text: Assad Vala to Conway, 1 run, flighted, turns in, a smidgen, Conway gets it off the inner-half of the bat on to the on-side for a single

full_text: Alei Nao to Conway, no run, and one more dot to end the over. Length delivery, nips away at 74.1 mph. Conway gets forward and pats it down into the off-side

short_text: Alei Nao to Conway, no run, length delivery, angled across at 75.8 mph. Conway pats it down to mid-on as the bottom hand
full_text: Alei Nao to Conway, no run, length delivery, angled across at 75.8 mph. Conway pats it down to mid-on as the bottom hand came off the handle

short_text: Alei Nao to Conway, , and four! Lovely delivery. Very unlucky that there was no one at slip. Got the ball to angle away,
full_text: Alei Nao to Conway, , and four! Lovely delivery. Very unlucky that there was no one at slip. Got the ball to angle away, Conway pushed at it and edged it. The keeper dived to his left but failed to grab it. The man at third man also dived over the ball and it is a four

full_text: Alei Nao to Conway, no run, keeps low, angled across at 73.8 mph, Conway stabs it down to mid-off

full_text: Alei Nao to Conway, no run, short, wide, at 73.7 mph, Conway looks to cut and gets an under-edge to the keeper. Wanted to hit it hard

short_text: Alei Nao to Ravindra, 1 run, has another single here. Stabs the drive and the man at mid-off dives to his right to stop
full_text: Alei Nao to Ravindra, 1 run, has another single here. Stabs the drive and the man at mid-off dives to his right to stop it. Only a single. Was a length delivery and the ball stopped a little on the batter

short_text: Kabua Morea to Ravindra, 1 run, NZ and Ravindra are off the mark here. Ravindra danced down, looked to nail it through t
full_text: Kabua Morea to Ravindra, 1 run, NZ and Ravindra are off the mark here. Ravindra danced down, looked to nail it through the off-side but inside-edged it down on to the on-side for a single

short_text: Kabua Morea to Ravindra, no run, and five dots on the row. Excellent stuff. Length delivery, Ravindra stabs it down to c
full_text: Kabua Morea to Ravindra, no run, and five dots on the row. Excellent stuff. Length delivery, Ravindra stabs it down to cover. No pace on it

short_text: Kabua Morea to Ravindra, no run, and he has been on the money. Morea off to a fine start here. Gets the ball to cut away
full_text: Kabua Morea to Ravindra, no run, and he has been on the money. Morea off to a fine start here. Gets the ball to cut away a little, Ravindra gets it off the outeredge and down to gully

short_text: Kabua Morea to Ravindra, no run, and another dot ball. This is good stuff. Got the ball to zone away, Ravindra got a str
full_text: Kabua Morea to Ravindra, no run, and another dot ball. This is good stuff. Got the ball to zone away, Ravindra got a stride out and pushed at it into the off-side with soft hands

short_text: Kabua Morea to Finn Allen, Caught by Kiplin Doriga!! Morea removes Allen. Early blow for the Kiwis. That was a length de
full_text: Kabua Morea to Finn Allen, Caught by Kiplin Doriga!! Morea removes Allen. Early blow for the Kiwis. That was a length delivery, angled across, Finn Allen threw his bat at it and edged it down to the keeper. That seamed away, kept low and Finn Allen got a faint tickle. The keeper managed to take a good low catch. The third umpire did have a look but deemed it clean. So, first strike for PNG.

short_text: Kabua Morea to Finn Allen, no run, length delivery, decks in, Finn Allen gets forward and defends it down into the deck.
full_text: Kabua Morea to Finn Allen, no run, length delivery, decks in, Finn Allen gets forward and defends it down into the deck. Nice shape into the batter
